meta.name: Magneta — acceptOwnership for Cronos backfill (Gateway only)
meta.description: After transferOwnership.ts runs on Cronos, MagnetaGateway is the only newly-deployed contract using Ownable2Step (LP/Swap/TaxClaim/TokenOps modules and MagnetaBridgeOApp use plain Ownable, transfer is immediate). Safe must accept Gateway ownership to finalize. Execute via execBatch.ts on the in-house Safe 0x40ea…b297.
